engagements.name: IBM VDP
engagements.description: Vulnerability disclosure program targeting IBM's massive infrastructure. Deep recon across 37K subdomains led to critical credential exposure and unauthenticated API access findings.
highlights: CRITICAL: Live MongoDB + Watson credentials exposed via GitLab
HIGH: Unauthenticated session CRUD on B2B Catalog API
37K subdomains enumerated, 700 live hosts probed
Threat model with 9 hypotheses — 2 confirmed with full PoC

engagements.name: Superdrug
engagements.description: Intigriti bug bounty program for UK healthcare retailer. Discovered exposed Swagger documentation, source maps, registration bypass, UAT environment access, and hardcoded API credentials.
highlights: HIGH: Healthcare API Swagger exposure with sensitive endpoints
MED: Registration reCAPTCHA validation order bypass
MED: UAT healthcare environment publicly accessible
Best scope discipline — 0 out-of-scope reports

engagements.name: Deriv
engagements.description: HackerOne program for fintech trading platform. OAuth redirect chain discovered, source maps submission duplicated. Authenticated testing needed for IDOR opportunities worth up to $5,000.
highlights: OAuth redirect_uri chain discovered (potential token theft)
Source maps report: DUPLICATE — someone found it first
Policy stress test: 9 of 12 reports dropped after review
IDOR params identified via source maps — untested (needs account)

engagements.name: Capital.com
engagements.description: Intigriti program for trading platform. Comprehensive recon with OpenAPI spec extraction. 8 configuration-level reports ready. Blocked from authenticated testing by geo-restrictions.
highlights: 3,295 subdomains enumerated, OpenAPI spec with 34 REST endpoints
8 consolidated reports covering CORS, S3, Actuator, SCIM exposure
Threat model: 3 high-value surfaces identified (trading API, WebSocket, payment)
Blocked: geo-restricted registration requires UK identity document

engagements.name: Just Eat Takeaway
engagements.description: Bugcrowd program for food delivery platform. Critical review revealed 7/10 reports were intelligence-not-vulnerabilities. Keycloak finding strongest at 65-75% acceptance probability.
highlights: Keycloak authentication finding: strongest report (65-75% acceptance)
Critical review: 7/10 reports reclassified as intelligence
Cut from 11 to 4 submission candidates after honest review
Key insight: IDOR on /orders/{id} = potential P1 ($3,500+)

engagements.name: Meesho
engagements.description: HackerOne program for Indian e-commerce platform. 75% out-of-scope rate due to *.valmo.in wildcard exclusion. Painful lesson in scope verification before testing.
highlights: 75% out-of-scope rate — worst performance across all programs
JWT leak found on excluded *.valmo.in asset
Scope lesson: wildcard exclusions override individual asset matches
0 confirmed submissions via API — status uncertain

engagements.name: OWASP Juice Shop
engagements.description: Comprehensive security assessment of OWASP Juice Shop — a deliberately vulnerable web application covering the OWASP Top 10 and beyond.
highlights: 26/110 challenges solved across all difficulty tiers
Full OWASP Top 10 coverage with reproducible PoCs
SQL injection, XSS, broken auth, access control bypasses
API abuse, SSRF, cryptographic failures identified
